title: 10 best herbal tinctures for prostatitis
description: Licorice tinctures helps with prostatitis because of its anti-inflammatory properties, which alleviate swelling and discomfort in the prostate gland. The tannins present in licorice root also help to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain associated with prostatitis. Additionally, licorice tincture has been shown to increase urine flow, reducing pressure on the prostate gland and providing relief from symptoms such as frequent urination, urgency, and painful ejaculation....
